Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Added the plugin version to the main window title.
Aligned the FC target ring and progress text higher.
Slimmed and tightened tier progress bars.
Shortened the target panel height.
Displayed the character name without the world in gold.
